qry:define.declare: <DATA oi_provincia="22" oi_municipio="" c_postal_desde="" c_postal_hasta="" ATRIB_ORDEN1="c_localidad" ORDEN1="Asc"> <LOCALIDADES nmd-col="1" /> </DATA>
qry:define.name: FILTER

qry:select.name: sql1
SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Localidades.LOCALIDAD\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#SOURCE:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad as oi_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.c_localidad as c_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad as d_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.c_postal as c_postal, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_departamento as d_departamento, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_adicional as d_adicional, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.e_telediscado as e_telediscado, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia as oi_provincia, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_municipio as oi_municipio FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES WHERE 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_provincia!='') {% AND ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia = {#SOURCE:@oi_provincia} %} {% %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_municipio!='') {% AND ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_municipio = {#SOURCE:@oi_municipio} %} {% %} %} {%? (string(#SOURCE:LOCALIDADES/LOCALIDAD/@id)!='') {% AND ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad IN ({%=string(#SOURCE:LOCALIDADES/LOCALIDAD/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY {%? (#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ATRIB_ORDEN1%} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDEN1!='') {% {%=#SOURCE:@ORDEN1%}, %} {% ASC, %} %} %} {% %} %} oi_localidad Asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia as oi_provincia, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.c_provincia as c_provincia, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia as d_provincia FROM ORG35_PROVINCIAS WHERE ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia={#PARAM:@value} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG32_MUNICIPIOS.oi_municipio as oi_municipio, ORG32_MUNICIPIOS.c_municipio as c_municipio, ORG32_MUNICIPIOS.d_municipio as d_municipio FROM ORG32_MUNICIPIOS WHERE ORG32_MUNICIPIOS.oi_municipio={#PARAM:@value} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Localidades.LOCALIDAD\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW
